summary: Phase 1.3 correctly ports guardrail.py (adapted for multi-tenant), CI workflow (project renamed, DrNick-specific steps removed), and Alembic skeleton (empty tree placeholder). All 3 sub-components are syntactically valid, safety-compliant, and spec-adherent with no ONFA reference leaks.

findings.description: R1_TIER_FROM_BODY regex includes shop_id/seller_id/tenant_id for multi-tenant (correct adaptation). Regex is heuristic-only (warn, not deny) and may miss nested dict patterns like data['shop_id'][0]. Acceptable for Phase 1 since rule is advisory.

ALLOWED_FILES lists 'docs/RULES.md' but Phase 1.3 steps (§7) do not explicitly require creating it. Acceptable — file is optional Ohana-specific documentation deferred to a future rules-hardening pass.
